rule_text: The box corner radius is border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px (TL TR BR BL order) — large on top-left + bottom-right, near-point on top-right + bottom-left, a 5:1 ratio. Never change it. Never simplify to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.
intent: Lock the signature asymmetric box radius.
summary: Iconography box border-radius must be 40px top-left & bottom-right, 8px top-right & bottom-left (5:1 ratio); never altered, simplified, swapped, or flipped.
